positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a whimsical forest creature, highly stylized and symmetrical. The creature should be a blend of fox and deer, rendered in clean, flowing silhouette lines with geometric accents. Surround it with stylized foliage, moon phases, and abstract stars, creating a dense but readable pattern. Use a limited color palette of deep sapphire blue, emerald green, and creamy ivory on a white background. Emphasize strong contrast and negative space. Poster-quality art print style, suitable for screen printing, high contrast, clean vector graphic, centered composition, flat graphic design.
